title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: One Workflow for Beautiful Frontends (LIVE)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a multi-model workflow combining Claude Opus for planning and integration, Gemini 3.5 Flash for UI design, and Archon orchestration to build frontend applications. The workflow uses each model's strengths: Opus for planning and copy, Gemini for frontend design, and Opus for integrations and deployment.
